name: 17q23_1_q23_2_TBX2_TBX4
description: 17q23.1-q23.2 recurrent microdeletion / microduplication (~2 Mb), flanked by direct-orientation SD blocks. Deletion causes ID, microcephaly, growth retardation, cardiac and limb defects (small patella syndrome features via TBX4 loss); duplication associated with more variable phenotype. Critical T-box genes: TBX2 and TBX4 (limb, cardiac development).

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD blocks of ~80-150 kb at >97% identity; unique core contains TBX2, TBX4, MED13, CACNG4, CACNG5, CACNG1, BCAS3, NACA2. TBX4 LoF also causes isolated childhood-onset PAH and small patella syndrome.
